entries.note: V60-A reuses the shipped V59 continuity, continuity-safe restoration, and advisory hardening surfaces by default.
V60-A admits only one typed non-chat-native seed intent record and does not compile raw transcript semantics into task law.
V60-A compiles one replayable task charter from the same selected seed intent plus the same frozen policy basis.
TaskResidual stays derived, replayable, and non-authorizing; it carries continuation context only.
If V60-A continues, it may descend only into the exact shipped V59 continuity-bound create_new exemplar path.
emit_governed_communication is posture only in V60-A; actual communication packet law remains deferred to V61.
V60-A preserves the shipped V56 single_step_local ticket duration and does not widen tickets into standing authority.
